TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Raymond_Brown, title = Raymond_Brown, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Raymond_Brown} }

S.FORM: Raymond Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1965 , ryax sa tay 5 nqu tay 7, Raymond Brown, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Raymond Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1965 , ryax sa tay 5 nqu tay 7, Raymond Brown, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: rajmon* βrown s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, rajmon* βrown, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
